nodes.context: Football hooligan firm associated with Aston Villa FC, based in Birmingham, England.
Previous Aston Villa hooligan firm, also used as alias for younger element of Aston Villa Hardcore.
Football hooligan firm associated with Birmingham City FC.
Football hooligan firm associated with Chelsea FC.
Hooligan firm associated with Paris Saint-Germain FC.

edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded the Steamers as a hooligan firm.

edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded the C-Crew as a hooligan firm.

edges.evidence_quote: The firm have been active since circa 1993, following on from previous Aston Villa hooligan firms the Steamers, C-Crew and Villa Youth.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore succeeded Villa Youth as a hooligan firm.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hardcore have clashed a number of times with the Zulu Warriors, associated with Aston Villa's fiercest rivals Birmingham City.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore has clashed with Zulu Warriors.

edges.evidence_quote: Steven Fowler... was jailed... for his part in an organised brawl between the Villa Hardcore and Chelsea Headhunters at King's Cross in London on 27 March 2004.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore fought with Chelsea Headhunters in an organized brawl.

edges.evidence_quote: members of the Hardcore took part in a street fight with PSG's Kop of Boulogne (KoB) hooligan firm outside a bar in the Pigalle district of Paris.
edges.context: Aston Villa Hardcore fought with Kop of Boulogne in a street fight.
